assertions: A preview table is shown before any task files are written
The user is asked to confirm before task files are created
Exactly 3 task specs are produced, one per plan step
Each task spec contains all required create-task sections
Each task spec has a frontmatter block with ref, feature, priority, and status fields
Step 2 (tests) is marked as depending on Step 1
Goals section contains 3 or more independently verifiable Must statements
